channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Trump Asks Netanyahu To Take "Softer Touch" In Dealing with Hezbollah
item.description: US President Donald Trump on Wednesday asked Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to take a "softer touch" in dealing with Hezbollah targets in Lebanon.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump on Wednesday asked Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to take a "softer touch" in dealing with Hezbollah targets in Lebanon.

item.title: Other Countries Have Ballistic Missiles, Unfair If Iran Does Not: Trump

media:content.media:description: Trump said that it's a little bit unfair for Iran if it does not have ballistic missiles.

item.description: US President Donald Trump said on Wednesday that it would be unfair for Iran not to have ballistic missiles if other countries have them.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump said on Wednesday that it would be unfair for Iran not to have ballistic missiles if other countries have them.

item.title: Lula Says Trump "Should Not Meddle" In Brazil's Elections

media:content.media:description: Lula said Trump could "learn from Brazil's civilized elections."

item.description: Lula and Trump have had an up-and-down relationship, which has soured again recently over new tariff threats. The pair did not hold an official meeting at the G7.
item.content:encoded: Lula and Trump have had an up-and-down relationship, which has soured again recently over new tariff threats. The pair did not hold an official meeting at the G7.

item.title: Open Hormuz, $300-Billion Fund, No Nukes: US Officials Release Iran Deal Text

media:content.media:description: Iran has so far not released any details of its own.

item.description: Hormuz reopening, $300-billion reconstruction fund, no nuclear weapons: US officials release text of Iran deal
item.content:encoded: Hormuz reopening, $300-billion reconstruction fund, no nuclear weapons: US officials release text of Iran deal

item.title: US Man Cleared Of False Child Abuse Allegations In Bogota After Video Sparked Outrage
item.description: Colombian President Gustavo Petro said that the man "apparently did not" abuse any children.
item.content:encoded: Colombian President Gustavo Petro said that the man "apparently did not" abuse any children.

item.title: Somalian Pirates Step Up Attacks As Ships Reroute Amid Middle East War

media:content.media:description: Somalia does have a functioning government that allows pirate groups to thrive.

item.description: As commercial passenger flights begin from Noida International Airport (Jewar) from tomorrow, India's aviation sector will add another operational airport to its growing network.
item.content:encoded: As commercial passenger flights begin from Noida International Airport (Jewar) from tomorrow, India's aviation sector will add another operational airport to its growing network.

item.title: US-Iran LIVE Updates: Trump Says Iran Accord To Be Signed 'Shortly', 'Maybe' Thursday Or Friday
item.description: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Netanyahu pledged that Iran would never be allowed to acquire nuclear weapons, regardless of the terms of any agreement.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Netanyahu pledged that Iran would never be allowed to acquire nuclear weapons, regardless of the terms of any agreement.

item.title: "Tomorrow, Maybe Next Day": Trump Injects Uncertainty Into Iran Deal Signing

media:content.media:description: He confirmed that a copy had been shared with Israel.

item.description: The document, titled the "Islamabad Memorandum of Understanding between the United States of America and the Islamic Republic of Iran," was eventually released by Washington on Wednesday.
item.content:encoded: The document, titled the "Islamabad Memorandum of Understanding between the United States of America and the Islamic Republic of Iran," was eventually released by Washington on Wednesday.

item.title: Why India Has A Seat At The G7 Table Without Being A Member

media:content.media:description: India's economic rise has made it impossible for global powers to ignore it

item.description: India is not a formal member of the G7, which includes the US, UK, Canada, France, Germany, Italy and Japan. Yet, it is regularly invited as a special guest, showing how much importance the group now gives to New Delhi's voice.
item.content:encoded: India is not a formal member of the G7, which includes the US, UK, Canada, France, Germany, Italy and Japan. Yet, it is regularly invited as a special guest, showing how much importance the group now gives to New Delhi's voice.

item.title: For Netanyahu, A "Softer Touch" Message From Trump On Lebanon

media:content.media:description: "Netanyahu happens to be a good man, gets a little excited sometimes," Trump said

item.description: US President Donald Trump said on Wednesday that Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu could use a "softer touch" in Lebanon in comments made at the close of a G7 summit in France.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump said on Wednesday that Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu could use a "softer touch" in Lebanon in comments made at the close of a G7 summit in France.

item.title: PM Modi Pushes Human-Centric AI At G7 Summit, Flags Deepfake Risks

media:content.media:description: PM Modi said AI policies must remain focused on expanding human potential

item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Wednesday urged world leaders to place human values at the centre of Artificial Intelligence (AI) development, calling for global cooperation to ensure the technology is deployed safely.
item.content:encoded: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Wednesday urged world leaders to place human values at the centre of Artificial Intelligence (AI) development, calling for global cooperation to ensure the technology is deployed safely.

item.title: How Trump's Iran Deal Is Creating Trouble For Netanyahu

media:content.media:description: Netanyahu's remarks came after Washington and Tehran announced a preliminary truce

item.description: While Washington appears focused on reducing tensions and moving towards a settlement, Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu has maintained that Israel's operations are far from over which has created a growing gap between the two allies.
item.content:encoded: While Washington appears focused on reducing tensions and moving towards a settlement, Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu has maintained that Israel's operations are far from over which has created a growing gap between the two allies.

item.title: PM Modi Flags "Safety Of Seafarers" To Trump Days After Indian Sailor Deaths

media:content.media:description: The PM stressed that keeping the Strait of Hormuz open is vital to the global economy.

item.description: "Safety Of Seafarers Of Utmost Importance": PM Modi To Trump At G7
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1114533/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>"Safety Of Seafarers Of Utmost Importance": PM Modi To Trump At G7

item.title: "New Momentum, New Energy In Ties": PM Modi's Top Quotes At Trump Meeting

media:content.media:description: PM Modi also underlined the importance of keeping key maritime trade routes open

item.description: PM Modi met US President Donald Trump on the sidelines of the G7 Summit in France, with the two leaders discussing India-US ties, peace efforts in West Asia, and the safety of Indian sailors amid tensions around the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: PM Modi met US President Donald Trump on the sidelines of the G7 Summit in France, with the two leaders discussing India-US ties, peace efforts in West Asia, and the safety of Indian sailors amid tensions around the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: "Calm, Cool And A Total Killer": Trump's Big Praise For PM Modi At G7 Meet

media:content.media:description: In comments during the working lunch, Trump said that he is not as calm as PM Modi

item.description: "Unlike PM Modi, who's calm, cool and a total killer, I am not. Look at him," Trump said as the two leaders prepare for talks on the sidelines of the G7 Summit.
item.content:encoded: "Unlike PM Modi, who's calm, cool and a total killer, I am not. Look at him," Trump said as the two leaders prepare for talks on the sidelines of the G7 Summit.

item.title: Trump Halts Intelligence Chief Confirmation, Renews Vote Curb Demand

media:content.media:description: Trump last week picked Jay Clayton as his next director of national intelligence (DNI).

item.description: US President Donald Trump said Wednesday he had suspended a Senate hearing on his own nominee for intelligence chief, in a fresh effort to push Congress to back his bill on voting restrictions.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump said Wednesday he had suspended a Senate hearing on his own nominee for intelligence chief, in a fresh effort to push Congress to back his bill on voting restrictions.

item.title: Video: At G7 Summit, Trump Declares "I'm The Boss", Draws Laughter

media:content.media:description: Macron has invited Trump to dinner at the Palace of Versailles outside Paris

item.description: The G7 summit of world powers in France is being chaired by President Emmanuel Macron as host but on Wednesday his guest US President Donald Trump left no doubt over who he believed was in charge.
item.content:encoded: The G7 summit of world powers in France is being chaired by President Emmanuel Macron as host but on Wednesday his guest US President Donald Trump left no doubt over who he believed was in charge.

item.title: Starbucks To Shut 2,000 South Korea Stores For Half A Day After Promo Row
item.description: Coffee chain to hold 'historical awareness' training after backlash against marketing campaign that evoked 1980 military crackdown.
item.content:encoded: Coffee chain to hold 'historical awareness' training after backlash against marketing campaign that evoked 1980 military crackdown.

item.title: "Will Go Back To Dropping Bombs If...": Trump Says Iran Deal Not Final

media:content.media:description: During the interaction, Trump stated that the US-Iran framework deal is "very strong"

item.description: Iran-US Peace Deal - "Will Go Back To Dropping Bombs If...": Trump Says Iran Deal Not Final
item.content:encoded: Iran-US Peace Deal - "Will Go Back To Dropping Bombs If...": Trump Says Iran Deal Not Final

item.title: After Bungee Tragedy, Another Brazilian Woman Dies In 100-Foot Fall While Hiking

media:content.media:description: The accident happened Sunday at Grutas do Spar in Marica.

item.description: A witness told local media that the guide lunged and tried to hold onto her by grabbing her arm, but nearly went over too.
item.content:encoded: A witness told local media that the guide lunged and tried to hold onto her by grabbing her arm, but nearly went over too.
